Pove -Up Hearig
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Russell Stanaland, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Lincoln Lucero as Personal Representative of the Estate of Marlene S. Willis. Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Mark H. Lazarus.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Lincoln Lucero sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $93,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $28,829.16
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $410.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $122,739.16
Judgment signed in open court.
